findings: --model/--models top-level override propagates correctly to the launched pane agent/commander via --model flag. bin/stampede.sh:35-36,605-606,850-853,941-953
In metaswarm, child Squad Lead/Worker model selection is NOT derived from the commander's --model override; prompt hardcodes premium pool rotation. bin/stampede.sh:729-740,771-794,883-888
GAP: User child-model override silently dropped in metaswarm — no env var or param carries --model/--models to downstream child launches. bin/stampede.sh:899-915
Commander doc describes assignment correctly: each child must use explicit premium-pool model; fallback to banned marks bundle partial. agents/stampede-commander.agent.md:150-168
per_commander_full_swarm=true propagates sizing separately from model assignment — commanders can launch with wrong models vs user's intent. agents/stampede-commander.agent.md:172-210
GAP: Preflight validates only MODEL_LIST[0] in metaswarm; later rotated commander model assignments not validated before launch. bin/stampede.sh:202,605-606
